chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1995. Type-Safe Compilation of Covariant Specialization: A Practical Case (CSD-95-890) by John Boyland and Giuseppe Castagna. The Evaluation of Video Layout Strategies for a High-Performance Storage Server (CSD-95-889) by Kimberly Keeton. A note on 'The Limited Performance Benefits of Migrating Active Processes for Load Sharing' (CSD-95-888) by Allen B. Downey and Mor Harchol-Balter. Exploiting Process Lifetime Distributions for Dynamic Load Balancing (CSD-95-887) by Mor Harchol-Balter and Allen B. Downey. The WALKTHRU Editor: Towards Realistic and Effective Interaction with Virtual Building Environments (CSD-95-886) by Richard Bukowski.

Bounding Delays in Packet-Routing Networks with Light Traffic (CSD-95-885) by Mor Harchol-Balter. On the Use of Quality of Service in IP over ATM (CSD-95-884) by Bruce A. Mah. A Supernodal Approach to Sparse Partial Pivoting (CSD-95-883) by James W. Demmel, Stanley C. Eisenstat, John R. Gilbert, Xiaoye S. Li and Joseph W.H. Liu. Transforming for Parallelism Using Symbolic Summarization (CSD-95-882) by Oliver Joseph Sharp. Re-examining Scheduling and Communication in Parallel Programs (CSD-95-881) by Andrea C. Dusseau, Remzi H. Arpaci and David E. Culler.

Pairwise Independence and Derandomization (CSD-95-880) by Michael Luby and Avi Wigderson. Multipol: A Distributed Data Structure Library (CSD-95-879) by Soumen Chakrabarti, Etienne Deprit, Eun-Jin Im, Jeff Jones, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Chi-Po Wen and Katherine Yelick. Parallelizing a Cell Simulation: Analysis, Abstraction, and Portability (CSD-95-878) by Stephen Steinberg. Performance Evaluation of Cache Prefetch Implementation (CSD-95-877) by John Tse and Alan Jay Smith. Sub-element Indexing and Probabilistic Retrieval in the POSTGRES Database System (CSD-95-876) by Anne M. Fontaine.

Improving World Wide Web Latency (CSD-95-875) by Venkata N. Padmanabhan. Application Specific, Multiprocessor Network Design (CSD-95-874) by A. Nathan McNamara. Microbenchmarking and Performance Prediction for Parallel Computers (CSD-95-873) by Stephen J. Von Worley and Alan Jay Smith. Storage Hierarchy Management for Scientific Computing (CSD-95-872) by Ethan Leo Miller. Rational Krylov, A Practical Algorithm for Large Sparse Nonsymmetric Matrix Pencils (CSD-95-871) by Axel Ruhe.

Handling Floating-point Exceptions in Numeric Programs (CSD-95-870) by John R. Hauser. Parallelizing the Phylogeny Problem (CSD-95-869) by Jeff A. Jones. Non-Sequential Tool Interaction Strategies for Sea-of-Gates Layout Synthesis (CSD-95-868) by Glenn David Adams. The Zebra Striped Network File System (CSD-95-867) by John Henry Hartman. Better Static Memory Management: Improving Region-Based Analysis of Higher-Order Languages (CSD-95-866) by Alexander Aiken, Manuel Fahndrich and Raph Levien.

Mantis: A Debugger for the Split-C Language (CSD-95-865) by Steve S. Lumetta. Adaptive Parallel Programs (CSD-95-864) by Steven Lucco. Belief Network Induction (CSD-95-863) by Charles Ronald Musick, Jr. Sawmill: A Logging File System for a High-Performance RAID Disk Array (CSD-95-862) by Kenneth William Shirriff. Fault Management for Realtime Networks (CSD-95-861) by Anindo Banerjea.

Constraint-Driven Analysis and Synthesis of High-Performance Analog IC Layout (M95/115) by Edoardo Charbon. Overcomplete Expansions for Digital Signal Processing (M95/114) by Zoran D. Cvetkovic. Theory of Hybrid Systems and Discrete Event Systems (M95/113) by Anuj Puri. Validity of the Classical Theory of Spontaneous Emission and the Fast Multipole Method for Electromagnetic Scattering (M95/112) by Si Chuen Michael Yeung. Hardware Implementation of Cellular Automata via the Cellular Neural Network Universal Machine (M95/111) by K.R. Crounse, E.L. Fung and Leon O. Chua.

Experimental Poincare Maps from the Twist-and-Flip Circuit (M95/110) by G-Q. Zhong, Leon O. Chua and R. Brown. Symbolic Two-Level Minimization (M95/109) by T. Villa, A. Saldanha, Robert K. Brayton and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Explicit and Implicit Algorithms for Binate Covering Problems (M95/108) by T. Villa, T. Kam, Robert K. Brayton and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Theory and Algorithms for State Minimization of Non-Deterministic FSM's (M95/107) by T. Kam, T. Villa, Robert K. Brayton and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Implicit Computation of Compatible Sets for State Minimization of ISFSM's (M95/106) by T. Kam, T. Villa, Robert K. Brayton and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli.

Bounded Scheduling of Process Networks (M95/105) by Thomas M. Parks. VIS: A System for Verification and Synthesis (M95/104) by The VIS Group, Robert K. Brayton and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Measurement of Synchronization in Noisy and Chaotic Dynamical Systems (M95/103) by P. Khoury, Michael A. Lieberman and Allan J. Lichtenberg. Centralizing Geometry Services for Three-Dimensional Integrated Circuits Topography Simulation (M95/102) by Robert H.-F. Wang. Real-Time Task Level Scheduling in the Polis Co-Design Environment (M95/101) by D.W. Engels.

Image Interpolation Using Wavelet-Based Edge Enhancement and Texture Analysis (M95/100) by S-H.G. Chang. Automated Low-Power ASIC Design for Speech Processing (M95/99) by E. Yeo. CMOS Baseline Process in the UC Berkeley Microfabrication Laboratory (M95/98) by S. Fang. Modeling Electronegative Discharges at Low Pressure (M95/97) by I. Kouznetsov, Allan J. Lichtenberg and Michael A. Lieberman. 2D Electromagnetic and TIC on a Quadrilateral Mesh (M95/96) by A.B. Langdon.
